title: Can't replicate connected dropdown style

posts.author: cire12 (Eric Powelson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Are these clean, connected dropdowns only available in select CRM “core” templates?

image326×434 21.5 KB

Whenever I try and create my own I’m left with this less than desirable format.

image395×574 22 KB

Is there any way to get my product listings dropdown to look more like the default contacts listing? In a perfect world I’d be able to make it look like this:

monday-mockup1051×1385 110 KB

From this board:

image1548×1056 223 KB

posts.author: drtanvisachar (Dr. Tanvi Sachar- Certified Monday.com Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @cire12 That dropdown style is only available on certain CRM core columns like Contacts. Regular Connected Boards columns use a different UI and can’t be styled to match it.

There’s no setting to change a connected column to the Contacts-style dropdown.

Common workarounds:
Use a Status or Label column for selection, then automate the connection
Mirror a clean display value from the connected board
Control selection through forms or views

Dr. Tanvi Sachar
Monday Certified Partner, Monday Wizard
